generated_items.name: Create_month_over_month_sales_growth
generated_items.expression:
VAR CurrentMonthSales = SUM(Sales[Sales])
VAR PrevMonthSales = CALCULATE(SUM(Sales[Sales]), DATEADD(Sales[OrderDate], -1, MONTH))
RETURN DIVIDE(CurrentMonthSales - PrevMonthSales, PrevMonthSales)
generated_items.description: Create month over month sales growth

generated_items.name: Create_top_5_products_table_by_total_sales
generated_items.description: Create top 5 products table by total sales
